chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Suit No. 768 of 2020 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on C.M.A. No. 3509/21. 2. For orders on C.M.A. No. 3510/21. ------------------ 26.02.2021 Mr. Muhammad Ameen, Advocate for plaintiff. ------------------ 1. Urgency application is granted. 2. By means of this application, the plaintiff seeks withdrawal of the instant suit unconditionally. Learned counsel for the plaintiff states that the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court; therefore, the plaintiff does not want to proceed with the case anymore; hence, under instructions this application has been filed. There is no impediment in allowing this application; hence, the same is allowed and in result thereof, the suit stands dismissed as withdrawn, alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE Athar Zai
